analysis: The project contains multiple HTML, CSS, and JS files across different directories (docs, github-page, test-website). The theme should be updated to focus on black holes with bulk animated objects, slides, and animated pages. The current CSS files need to be enhanced with cosmic and black hole visuals, animations, and interactive elements.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the CSS file includes all necessary styles for the black hole theme, animations, and interactive elements.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html.
Enhance the CSS file with cosmic and black hole visuals, animations, and interactive elements to match the black holes theme.
Update the CSS file to include cosmic and black hole visuals, animations, and interactive elements for the black holes theme.
